creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2009-06-21 20:36:15 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    security/openssh-portable/files 
                                    contrib-openssh-5.1_p1-lpk-64bit.patch 
                                    contrib-openssh-lpk-5.1p1-0.3.10-servconf.c.patch 
                                    contrib-openssh-lpk-5.1p1-0.3.10.patch 
                                    lpk+hpn-servconf.c.patch 
                                    openssh-5.2p1-hpn13v6-servconf.c.diff 
                                    openssh-5.2p1-hpn13v6.diff

                                    openssh-lpk-5.0p1-64bit.patch 
  Log:
  - security/openssh-portable: update HPN and LPK patches to newer versions
  - still broken on -CURRENT
  
  PR:             ports/135407
  Submitted by:   Denis Barov <dindin@dindin.ru> (maintainer)
